id.label: Mã Lead
id.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["id"])) : id })()}}

customerName.label: Tên Khách hàng
customerName.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["customerName"])) : customerName })()}}

status.label: Trạng thái
status.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["status"])) : status })()}}
status.cellBackground:
{{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow.status === 'NEW_LEAD' ? '#E3F2FD' : 
  currentRow.status === 'CONTACTED' ? '#FFF8E1' : 
  currentRow.status === 'PROCESSING' ? '#FFF3E0' : 
  currentRow.status === 'COMPLETED' ? '#E8F5E9' : 
  currentRow.status === 'REJECTED' ? '#FFEBEE' : '#F5F5F5')) : currentRow.status === 'NEW_LEAD' ? '#E3F2FD' : 
  currentRow.status === 'CONTACTED' ? '#FFF8E1' : 
  currentRow.status === 'PROCESSING' ? '#FFF3E0' : 
  currentRow.status === 'COMPLETED' ? '#E8F5E9' : 
  currentRow.status === 'REJECTED' ? '#FFEBEE' : '#F5F5F5' })()}}

ownerId.label: ownerId
ownerId.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["ownerId"])) : ownerId })()}}

productType.label: Sản phẩm
productType.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["productType"])) : productType })()}}

productDetails.label: productDetails
productDetails.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["productDetails"])) : productDetails })()}}

createdAt.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["createdAt"])) : createdAt })()}}

updatedAt.label: updatedAt
updatedAt.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["updatedAt"])) : updatedAt })()}}
